source_title: Sea and OpenAI Deepen Strategic Partnership (ChatGPT for Business to Shopee sellers)
claim: Sea Limited and OpenAI announced a new strategic partnership on 22 June 2026 that introduces ChatGPT for Business to Shopee sellers and continues broadening access to OpenAI products through the ShopeeVIP membership program across Southeast Asia and Brazil.
research_implication: Shows SEA's AI strategy spans both consumer discovery and seller-side monetization/tooling, a hybrid model rather than a single consumer subscription.
